settings.title: Settings
settings.notif_new_missions_sub: Get notified for each new request
settings.privacy_policy_content:
At FIXED, we take the protection of your personal data very seriously. The information collected is used solely to provide our provider-client matching services.

Your data is never sold to third parties. You can exercise your rights of access, rectification and deletion by contacting us.

Payment data is processed securely via Stripe. Your banking information is never stored on our servers.
settings.delete_account_confirm: Do you really want to delete your account? This action is irreversible and will result in the loss of all your data.

faq.a1: FIXED connects clients with qualified providers for home services. Create a request, a nearby available provider accepts it, and you track the intervention in real time.
faq.a2: Each provider goes through a verification process: identity documents, professional insurance, and a trade quiz. Only validated profiles can accept missions.
faq.a3: Payment is secured via Stripe. You pay before the mission and the funds are only released to the provider once the mission is complete.
faq.q4: What if I want to cancel a mission?
faq.a4: You can cancel a mission from the tracking screen, as long as the provider hasn't started the intervention yet. Refund processed within 3–5 business days.
faq.q5: How do I contact a provider?
faq.a5: Once your mission is accepted, you can send a message or call the provider directly from the tracking screen.
faq.q6: How do I leave a review?
faq.a6: At the end of each mission, you're invited to rate your provider from 1 to 5 stars and leave a comment. Your reviews help the community.
faq.q7: How do I withdraw my earnings (providers)?
faq.a7: From the Wallet tab, submit a withdrawal request. You must first set up your Stripe bank account in your profile.

ext.support_level_resolution_sub: Here is how we will help you
ext.support_search_other: Try another term or choose « General question » below.
ext.support_create_first: Create your first request to be able to link it to a support ticket.
ext.support_team_notified: Our team has been notified. Response guaranteed {{sla}}.
ext.support_ticket_failed: We were unable to create the ticket automatically. Contact support directly — your request will be processed immediately.
ext.support_problem_resolution_arrival: We're contacting the provider for you. If they don't respond within 5 minutes, we'll offer you another qualified provider.
ext.support_problem_hint_lost: They're not at the indicated address
ext.support_problem_resolution_lost: The provider has your exact address. Try the chat or direct call from the tracking screen. Otherwise our team will step in.
ext.support_problem_resolution_cancel: You can cancel from the tracking screen. The refund is automatic within 3-5 business days depending on your payment method.
ext.support_problem_resolution_security: Your safety is our absolute priority. Our team is notified immediately and will call you back within minutes.
ext.support_problem_label_stop: I want to stop the mission
ext.support_problem_hint_stop: The work isn't going as planned
ext.support_problem_resolution_stop: Our support can interrupt the ongoing mission. The provider will be notified and a fair settlement will be negotiated for the work already done.
ext.support_problem_resolution_done_bad: We take quality very seriously. Describe the problem to our team — they can arrange a return visit from the provider or a goodwill gesture.
ext.support_problem_resolution_damage: Immediate investigation. Before/after photos are examined by our team and our professional insurance covers eligible damage.
ext.support_problem_resolution_payment: Our finance team will review your case. Any eligible refund is processed within 5 business days.
ext.support_problem_resolution_unauth: Immediate account security. Verification of the payment and investigation into the origin of the mission.
ext.support_problem_resolution_account: Our support can investigate your account, restore access or correct data.
ext.support_problem_resolution_invoice: Your invoices are available in Documents → Invoices. For specific questions, our team can help you.
ext.support_problem_resolution_other: Describe your situation to our team. We reply within the business day — often in less than an hour.
ext.privacy_data_body:
Fixed only collects the data necessary for the proper functioning of the service:

• Identification information (name, email)
• Location data (only during an active mission)
• History of missions and payments
• Notification preferences

This data is never sold to third parties.
ext.privacy_rights_body:
Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:

• Right of access to your data
• Right of rectification
• Right to erasure («right to be forgotten»)
• Right to portability

To exercise these rights, contact us at
ext.privacy_cookies_body: The app only uses essential technical cookies (authentication, session). No advertising trackers are used.
ext.privacy_retention_body: Your data is retained for the duration of your account, then 3 years after its closure for legal purposes. Payment data is retained by Stripe in accordance with financial regulations.
ext.privacy_danger_sub: Deleting your account is final and irreversible.
ext.privacy_delete_confirm_msg: This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted.

ext.cgu_intro:
These Terms of Use (ToU) govern access to and use of the FIXED platform, operated by FIXED PLATEFORM SRL, a Belgian limited liability company.

FIXED acts exclusively as an intermediation platform and is not a party to the service contract between the Client and the Provider.
ext.cgu_footer:
FIXED PLATEFORM SRL · support@thefixed.app
v1.0 — 15 March 2026

help.hero_sub: Search your question or write to us directly. Average response under 2 hours.
help.beta_sub: Quick response during the testing phase
help.empty_faq: No question matches. Contact us via WhatsApp.
help.contact_email_sub: Email · response within 24h on business days
help.client_a1: For a fixed-price mission, you pay upfront via Stripe (card, Bancontact, Apple Pay, Google Pay). For a quote request, only the callout fee (€29 standard, €49 urgent) is charged upfront — the rest is billed after you accept the quote.
help.client_q2: Are Bancontact and Apple Pay accepted?
help.client_a2: Yes, all payment methods supported by Stripe are available: card, Bancontact, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Klarna depending on the amount.
help.client_q3: How do refunds work if no one accepts my request?
help.client_a3: If no provider validates your request within the time limit (72h for a quote), you're automatically refunded on the original payment method.
help.client_a4: Yes, as long as the mission is still being matched or recently accepted. Once the provider is on site or the mission is in progress, cancellation goes through support to manage cost sharing.
help.client_q5: How do I share the PIN code with the provider?
help.client_a5: The 4-digit PIN appears on your tracking screen as soon as the provider is on the way. Share it verbally on arrival — the provider enters it in their app to start the mission.
help.client_q6: What if my provider is late?
help.client_a6: You can call them directly from the tracking screen (green button). If there's an issue, open the mission sheet via the "..." menu at the top and choose "Contact support".
help.client_q7: How do I change my email address?
help.client_a7: This change isn't yet self-service. Contact support via WhatsApp or email with your old and new addresses.
help.client_q8: My account has been suspended, what should I do?
help.client_a8: Immediately contact support at support@thefixed.app with your email address. Our team responds within 24h on business days.
help.client_q9: How do I delete my account?
help.client_a9: Go to Profile → Settings → Privacy → Delete my account. Per GDPR, your data is deleted within 30 days, except accounting documents kept for 7 years.
help.client_q10: How do I become a FIXED provider?
help.client_a10: From your profile, tap "Become a provider" and complete the 4 steps: introduction, service area, service categories, submission. Our team validates your application within 48h.
help.provider_q1: When do I get paid for my missions?
help.provider_a1: As soon as the mission is marked complete and the client PIN is verified, 80% of the client amount is credited to your FIXED wallet. You can withdraw your earnings to your bank account at any time (payout within 1 to 3 business days).
help.provider_q2: How does the FIXED commission work?
help.provider_a2: FIXED takes 20% of the client price (Free plan). With the Pro subscription (€29/month) or Pro+ (€99.99/month), your commission drops and you get access to more opportunities. More details in Profile → Subscription.
help.provider_q3: What happens if the client cancels after I've travelled?
help.provider_a3: If the mission is in progress and the client cancels, you're compensated via cost sharing managed by support. Open a ticket with the mission number and proof of travel.
help.provider_q4: How do I verify the client's PIN code?
help.provider_a4: Upon arrival, ask the client for the 4-digit PIN. Enter it in the mission screen (step 2) — the mission starts automatically once validated.
help.provider_q5: How do I complete a mission?
help.provider_a5: Take a "before" photo (step 3) on arrival, then an "after" photo at the end. Then tap "Complete mission" — your earnings are credited immediately.
help.provider_q6: I can't start a mission (no PIN, client unreachable)…
help.provider_a6: Open the "..." menu at the top of the mission screen and choose "Abandon this mission". Support is notified and you can resume your activity.
help.provider_q7: How do I view my upcoming missions?
help.provider_a7: The Missions tab lists your upcoming planned missions, active missions, and history. Filter by date to plan your week.
help.provider_q8: How do I upgrade to Pro / Pro+?
help.provider_a8: Profile → Subscription → Choose a plan. The switch is immediate, and the lower commission applies from your next accepted mission.
help.provider_q9: How do I update my KYC documents?
help.provider_a9: Profile → Documents. Rejected documents can be re-uploaded, approved documents can be updated before expiry. Support reviews within 24-48h.
help.provider_q10: My provider profile is suspended, why?
help.provider_a10: Automatic suspension occurs after repeated low ratings, expired documents, or a validated client complaint. Contact support via WhatsApp to understand the cause and lift the suspension.
help.provider_a11: You receive opportunities matching your categories, your area, and your availability. Pro+ users have priority on urgent missions. Enable background geolocation to never miss out.
help.provider_q12: Why am I not receiving notifications for new requests?
help.provider_a12: Check: (1) Notifications enabled in iOS / Android settings, (2) Background geolocation allowed, (3) You're set to "Available" on the dashboard, (4) Your categories and area cover the mission. If everything is OK, contact support.
